nasb.text: Those who were numbered of them were 23,000, every male from a month old and upward, for they were not numbered among the sons of Israel since no inheritance was given to them among the sons of Israel.

esv.text: And those listed were 23,000, every male from a month old and upward. For they were not listed among the people of Israel, because there was no inheritance given to them among the people of Israel.

cnv.text: 利未人中，從一個月以上被數點的所有男丁，共有二萬三千人。在以色列人中沒有數點他們，因為在以色列人中，沒有把產業分給他們。

ccb.text: 利未人中一个月以上的男性共登记了两万三千人，他们的人数没有登记在以色列人中，因为他们在以色列人中不分产业。
